usage_id: benda umum; fallback counter untuk banyak benda non-manusia
notes: Use mostly up to 9; 10 is とお without つ.
More scalable than つ for 10+ items.
1 and 2 are irregular: 一人/二人.
Sound changes: ぽん/ぼん/ほん.
Very common for vehicles and devices.
Sound changes: ぴき/びき/ひき.
Useful but can be after core N5.
Frequency counter, e.g. 一週間に三回.
Reading may be かい/がい depending number.
Used for number/order; 一番 also means most/best.
Sound changes: ぱい/ばい/はい.
才 is common shorthand; 二十歳 is はたち.
Month names have special readings for 4,7,9.
Written variants: ヶ月, か月, ヵ月.
Attach after counter to make ordinal.
